data.title: Bitcoin Miner Price Targets Raised to Reflect Improved Industry Economics: JPMorgan
data.description:
• JPMorgan raised its price targets for CleanSpark, Riot Platforms and MARA Holdings.
  • The increases were due to higher bitcoin prices and improving mining profitability, the report said.
  • The bank reiterated its overweight rating on CleanSpark, IREN and Riot Platforms, and its neutral rating for Cipher Mining and MARA Holdings.

data.title: Cardano's Charles Hoskinson Suggests Swapping $100M of ADA for Bitcoin, Stablecoins
data.description:
• Charles Hoskinson proposed converting $100M of ADA into bitcoin and stablecoins (USDM, USDA) to boost Cardano’s DeFi and stablecoin ecosystem.
  • He dismissed concerns over market impact, saying that the token does not have an issue with liquidity.
  • The proposal contrasts with Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard’s view that TVL is not a key adoption metric.

data.title: Ether Plunges 7% as Traders Flee to Dollar and Gold After Israel Strikes Iran
data.description:
• ETH dropped 7.05% to $2,536.06 with sharp losses concentrated during U.S. evening trading, according to CoinDesk Research's technical analysis model.
  • Volume reached nearly 692K ETH as price fell from a high of $2,770.56 to $2,477.71.
  • The drop coincided with a global risk-off move following Israeli military strikes in Iran.
  • A modest bounce from the $2,480 area has seen ETH stabilizing in the $2,530 range

data.title: Walmart, Amazon Mull Dollar-Pegged Stablecoins in the U.S.: WSJ
data.description:
• Stablecoins could eliminate costly card processing fees and reduce transaction times, especially for cross-border payments.
  • A stablecoin system from Amazon or Walmart could shift consumer transactions away from banks, intensifying pressure on card networks like Visa and Mastercard.

data.title: Shopify to Enable USDC Payments on Coinbase's Base for Merchants Worldwide
data.description:
• USDC stablecoin payments will be made available on Base to millions of Shopify merchants worldwide.
  • The initiative is designed to streamline global commerce with crypto-native infrastructure.

data.title: Coinbase to Launch Bitcoin Rewards Card With Amex, While Eyeing U.S. Futures Expansion
data.description:
• Coinbase plans to launch a credit card offering 4% bitcoin cashback in partnership with American Express.
  • The move aligns with a trend of crypto exchanges introducing payment cards to spend digital asset holdings for everyday purchases.
  • The announcement coincides with Coinbase's potential plans to bring perpetual futures trading to the U.S.

data.title: XRP Could Capture 14% of SWIFT’s Global Volume, Ripple CEO Says
data.description:
• Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse said XRP could capture 14% of SWIFT's global volume in cross-border payments within five years.
  • Garlinghouse emphasizes XRP's role as a liquidity solution, rather than just a messaging system, to compete with the global interbank messaging system, SWIFT.
  • Ripple's blockchain technology allows for instant currency conversion, reducing the need for banks to hold foreign funds and speeding up transactions.

data.title: Anthony Pompliano Set to Head $750M Bitcoin Investment Vehicle: FT
data.description:
• Anthony Pompliano is set to become CEO of ProCapBTC, which plans to raise $750 million to acquire bitcoin, according to the Financial Times.
  • ProCapBTC's proposed deal includes $500 million in equity and $250 million in convertible debt in a merger with a SPAC backed by Cohen & Company.
  • The move comes amid renewed enthusiasm in crypto markets following U.S. President Donald Trump's pro-crypto stance and regulatory easing.

data.title: Ripple, SEC File Joint Motion to Release $125M Held in Escrow
data.description:
• The SEC and Ripple have filed a joint motion to dissolve the injunction in their case and release the $125 million civil penalty.
  • Under the proposal, $50 million would go to the SEC, and $75 million would be returned to Ripple.
  • The motion cites changing regulatory attitudes and aims to avoid further litigation and settle outstanding appeals.

data.title: XRP, SOL Poised to Take Off Amid Rocketing Institutional Demand, Analyst Says
data.description:
• Crypto markets experienced volatility due to geopolitical tensions, but tokens like XRP and Solana's SOL are gaining institutional interest.
  • XRP is seeing significant corporate treasury investment, with potential price growth if legal and ETF conditions improve.
  • Solana's strong network fundamentals and ETF demand are driving its price, with projections suggesting further gains.
